message:
Add test coverage for config, git, output, utils, and integrations packages

This commit adds test files for packages that previously had 0% test
coverage, establishing the foundation for reaching the 90% coverage
target across the entire codebase.

## New Test Files

### config/config_test.go
Tests for the configuration loading and validation system:
- TestLoadDefaultConfig: Default values applied correctly
- TestLoadConfigFromFile: YAML parsing and field mapping
- TestConfigMerging: User config overrides project config
- TestConfigValidation: Invalid config rejection
- TestRiskTierConfiguration: Tier settings validation
- TestReviewPoolConfiguration: Cross-project settings
- TestEnvironmentVariableOverride: Env var precedence

### git/git_test.go
Tests for git integration and repository operations:
- TestDetectGitRepo: Repository root detection
- TestDetectNonGitDirectory: Non-repo handling
- TestParseGitLog: Commit message parsing
- TestExtractSLBMetadata: Metadata extraction from commits
- TestGitUserConfig: User name/email detection
- TestWorktreeHandling: Git worktree support

### output/output_test.go
Tests for output formatting across formats:
- TestJSONOutput: Valid JSON generation
- TestTextOutput: Human-readable formatting
- TestTableOutput: Column alignment and truncation
- TestFormatDetection: Format flag parsing
- TestEmptyOutput: Empty state handling
- TestLargeOutput: Performance with large datasets
- TestColorOutput: ANSI color application

### utils/utils_test.go
Tests for shared utility functions:
- TestStringTruncation: Truncate with ellipsis
- TestTimeFormatting: RFC3339 and relative time
- TestCommandHashing: Consistent hash generation
- TestPathCanonicalization: Absolute path resolution
- TestEnvironmentExpansion: Variable substitution
- TestUnicodeHandling: UTF-8 string operations

### integrations/agentmail.go
Agent mail integration for cross-agent communication:
- AgentMailClient: Interface to agent-mail MCP server
- SendNotification(): Notify other agents of requests
- ReceiveMessages(): Poll for incoming messages
- ThreadTracking: Maintain conversation threads

### integrations/integrations_test.go
Tests for integration layer:
- TestAgentMailConnection: Server connectivity
- TestAgentMailSendReceive: Message round-trip
- TestMCPProtocolCompliance: MCP spec validation
- TestIntegrationTimeout: Timeout handling
- TestIntegrationRetry: Retry logic

## Test Characteristics

All tests follow SLB testing philosophy:
- Real implementations where possible (real files, real git repos)
- Table-driven structure for clarity and extensibility
- Isolated test environments using t.TempDir()
- Fast execution suitable for CI/CD pipelines
- Race detector compatible

## Coverage Impact

These tests address the 0% coverage packages identified in the
testing strategy, moving toward the 90% target:

| Package      | Before | After (Est.) |
|--------------|--------|--------------|
| config       | 0%     | ~70%         |
| git          | 0%     | ~60%         |
| output       | 0%     | ~80%         |
| utils        | 0%     | ~85%         |
| integrations | 0%     | ~50%         |

Further test additions are planned in subsequent commits to reach
the full 90% target.
